title: Will there be an economic collapse in America? - Request

transcript.text: Here is a video request by Gypsy Hustled as I'm going through my video requests.
He says, can you talk about whether you believe there will be a full-on economic collapse
In the United States, such as a debt crisis hyperinflation?
Also, if there is a collapse in the dollar, what sort of crisis would emerge?
And what would be the best way to survive and thrive in this environment?
Would you predict the power shift would emerge from the west to the east with China being
The dominant economic superpower?
Thanks.
Okie dokie.
Yeah, I've been watching some economic movies or documentaries lately.
If you look at my likes, you can see them.
And I guess I'll attach them to this video.
Like the history of money, videos about the Federal Reserve and stuff like that.
And people are saying that there's going to be – I think even Ron Paul is saying that
There's going to be an economic – the dollar is going to collapse because so many people – because
The dollar is the – is the – like the backed currency of the whole world, the way
That gold used to be in the past.
And now it's the dollar.
And, you know, people all over the world are buying up the dollar.
And after people realize that they're just – that it's just a fiat currency, they're
Going to stop buying it.
And then they're going to sell the dollar and, like, buy, like, actual physical things.
And they're saying that, like, the real – the super rich people who know what's
Happening, what's going on, what's coming, are actually using their money to buy physical
Things because they're expecting the dollar to collapse.
And if you look around, I think you'll notice that.
But, you know, you look around and people are, like, buying up houses, you know, and,
Like, land.
And you're, like, like, why are you buying up houses and land, like, if you don't need
It?
And it's because they're expecting the dollar to collapse.
And then that – you know, they'll own their house instead of just these dollars.
And then what would happen after that?
Well, yeah, I think that there is a – I think a big shakeup.
And I think the dollar will collapse, but not collapse catastrophically.
I think what's happening with the economy right now is – well, it's kind of – when
It's orchestrated by, you know, super rich people, but they're not – these super rich
People, they're not as smart as, like, some people would give them credit for in a way.
And then in another way, they're just exactly as people expect them to be.
They're just really smart in terms of making money for themselves, but they don't really
Think that much ahead in terms of what's good for everybody.
But the way that God works is that it always works out, working for everybody.
So, for example, the world right now, first world countries are a lot richer than third
World countries.
And, you know, somebody in a first world country, you know, you can go in and get a job at, like,
The supermarket or whatever, doing a menial job, get $10 an hour.
Whereas in a third world country, you're going to get, like, a really third world country,
Like Bangladesh, you'll get, like, you know, $30 a month or something like that, you know.
And so the discrepancy is so much that that's causing big companies to outsource and outsource
Their work to these other countries in order to make the people who own the companies richer.
And that's about as far as those people are thinking.
But, and, I mean, they're not that dumb.
They also know that, or some of them, maybe even subconsciously.
Because what's really, what's also happening is we're moving the, we're making the industry,
The world economic, you know, machine more international, which is a good thing.
And we're spreading the wealth around.
These people who are getting, voluntarily getting jobs for these big companies in other countries,
The American company is actually doing them a favor.
I mean, it is, it's the best thing for them.
There's, but when the dollar does collapse and, or the shakeup, however it happens,
This isn't my area of expertise, but when it does happen, it will,
The end result is going to be that other countries are going to be more on a level playing field with America,
Which is a good thing.
And the poor people will be getting as much money,
A more closer amount of money as American people.
Now, how that's going to happen, I don't really know.
But, but let's see.
